Interested in working with us?

Employment Opportunities

Start a Career Working in a Specialized Hand Therapy Rehab Clinic Now

Join the staff at the Hand and Upper Limb Clinic for the opportunity to be a part of an amazing, supportive and talented group of individuals in an environment that promotes good health in all aspects. We treat a variety of patients including: post-operative surgical patients, patients with moderate to severe injuries of the hand and upper limb, patients with arthritic diagnoses or motor neuron conditions, and more.

Acquire valuable experience working in the foremost shoulder rehab clinic in north-western Ontario.

Currently, we require a full-time Physiotherapist; outpatient orthopedic experience is an asset (not necessarily in the upper extremity). This will be a salaried position including paid vacation and extended health benefits, depending upon experience. Preference for CHT.

We are also seeking a Registered Massage Therapist with either full or part-time availability.

Apply now and begin a rewarding career in private health care!

Please send all resumes to Mat.shaw@hulc.ca
